source: User request: verify should use Nx targets. Run: LINEAR_API_KEY=xxx node scripts/linear/create-issues.mjs --input docs/backlog/verify-nx-targets-tickets.json --team-key ANM

tickets.title: [X Platform] Migrate all verify steps to Nx targets
tickets.description:
## Summary
Replace scripts/verify shell logic with Nx targets. CI and local runs should invoke nx run-many, not custom scripts.

## Current state
- verify_apps: now uses nx run-many -t build (done)
- verify_platform: shell script with cd + go test, python, node, cargo
- verify_docs: shell script with grep + node -e + mint
- verify_agents: ./agents/blueprints/verify

## Target state
- platform: Nx targets for Go/Rust/Python checks (or nx:run-commands)
- docs: Nx target for Mintlify verify
- agents: Nx target or keep as script if no Nx project
- CI: nx run-many -t verify (or per-job targets) instead of ./scripts/verify

## Acceptance criteria
- scripts/verify becomes a thin wrapper that runs nx, or is removed
- CI workflows use nx run-many directly
- All verify logic lives in project.json / nx.json targets
